TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Yoweri_Museveni, title = Yoweri_Museveni, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Yoweri_Museveni} }

S.FORM: I 1944 a miheca saka 9 folad saka 15 a romi'ad masofoc ci Yoweri Museveni, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Uganda anini i ci Yoweri Museveni, patirengan a romi'ad i 1986 a miheca saka 1 folad saka 29 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i jo~uw…ôri mo~u~us…ôb~v…ôni, ma…ĺamiko~umo~u…¨~…ģaj a tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u o~u~u*an…¨~…ģa anini i ¶i jo~uw…ôri mo~u~us…ôb~v…ôni, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ.
S.FORM: I 1944 a miheca saka 9 folad saka 15 a romi'ad masofoc ci Yoweri Museveni, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Uganda anini i ci Yoweri Museveni, patirengan a romi'ad i 1986 a miheca saka 1 folad saka 29 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i jo~uw…ôri mo~u~us…ôb~v…ôni, ma…ĺamiko~umo~u…¨~…ģaj a tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u o~u~u*an…¨~…ģa anini i ¶i jo~uw…ôri mo~u~us…ôb~v…ôni, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ.
